# Vendored Pixel Loom foundation

Source: https://github.com/alexradunet/basm-design-system  
Revision: `d84061c9844806b21a5a6c93874094a43b456ce9`

Orbit vendors the Linen tokens (with Indigo retained as an optional palette) and self-hosted fonts for offline use. The source project's global `base.css` and site-oriented `components.css` are intentionally not included; Orbit consumes the design tokens and applies them through its spatial application styles.

Licensed under MIT. See `LICENSE`.
